name: WinMate Inc.
summary: WinMate Inc. manufactures and sells industrial displays and touch screen devices worldwide. The company offers rugged mobile solutions, including rugged mobile computers and tablets, and ultra-rugged tablets; rugged industrial systems, such as industrial panel PCs and application ready panel PCs, multi-touch HMI and chassis HMI, self-interactive KIOSK, and IP67; and rugged industrial displays, including USB type-C displays, power over ethernet touch monitors, multi touch displays, sunlight readable displays, temperature displays, rack LCD/1Uconsole drawers, healthcare grade 4K and multi touch monitors, and LCD scaler boards. Its rugged embedded computing products comprise IoT gateway, single board computers, EAC PRO, M-series and marine EAC box PC, 2U-rack IPC, and DIN rail, as well as ARM, fan less, standard, and full box PCs; vehicle mounted computers include FM07 series, M101BK, FM08, FM10, and FM10Q; and digital signage and bartype products consist of bartype panel PCs and bartype displays. In addition, the company offers healthcare solutions, such as healthcare grade 4K monitors, multi-touch monitors, and mobile solutions. It serves industrial IIoT and edge computing, healthcare, food, beverage and chemical, retail, oil and gas, automotive, warehouse and logistics, marine, military, field services, heavy duty, factory automation, transportation, smart-grid, and public safety industries. WinMate Inc. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
